opportunities.title: [Hiring] VODs Trimmer/Editor ($250/month, Remote, Long Term, Part Time)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] VODs Trimmer/Editor ($250/month, Remote, Long Term, Part Time)

Looking for someone who can trim down 22-24 hours of gaming and reaction footage weekly. 2 gaming and 2 reaction VODs per week(Tues Thurs Sat Sun), each lasting 5.5-6hours. Your job is to cut out the boring part, and keep as much volume as possible(30min-4.5hours for gaming output video/20min-2hours for reaction output video), similar to Caseoh's VODs style gameplay/walkthrough gameplay series and Joe Bart style reaction video, intro+clean cut+occasionally zooming in & out+a same outro for every video, nothing fancy,
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Role is video editing, not aligned with software development or React/frontend expertise.

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Part-Time Reddit Commenting Work, Earn $80–$100 | Flexible & Beginner Friendly
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Part-Time Reddit Commenting Work, Earn $80–$100 | Flexible & Beginner Friendly

We’re looking for people to help with simple Reddit engagement tasks. No previous experience is required, and the work is easy to follow. What the work involves: Posting and commenting on Reddit Following simple instructions Around 80–100 comments per month Flexible schedule, work in your free time Requirements: Phone or laptop with internet access An active Reddit account Minimum 100 karma Account should be regularly used for posting and commenting Basic understanding of how Reddit works Payout: 5$-10$ pe
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Not a software development role; involves inauthentic online activity.
